message: Just got home. Thinking of ordering pizza.
Lucky. I'm still stuck finishing homework.
Same here. This assignment is taking forever.
We should hop on a game after you're done.
Yeah, I'll be free by then.
Let's do a couple Fortnite matches, then Minecraft.
Also, who's bringing snacks if we hang out this weekend?
Finally, something to look forward to.
Just don't be late this time, Jigyesh 😂
One time... and nobody lets me forget it.
Just wanted to know , have you completed the maths assignment
Yeah I've Completed it , let me share you the pdf of the assignment !
Thank you so much bro , it will be very helpful
i need some help about the physics numericals
it's the problem number unit-3 , question-53
okay let me see it , give me 5 minutes
yo , I have done the question , check photo i send
thanks for the solution , i was stuck at this for so long
I am good bro , what about you ?
oh what's up other than that !!
yeahh , actually i forget to tell , i am planning a trip to manali with my collegues
have you talked about this with amma ?
that you wanna buy a new bike ?
but you should ask her before making any decision
Who finished the milk and put the empty carton back? 😑
It was definitely one of you two.
Then explain the chocolate wrapper in your room.
Mom asked someone to buy bread.
Anything else? Should I buy the whole store?
And don't forget the change this time.
Also, who left their socks in the living room?
I was going to pick them up.
well , I am going outside , Bye Bye]
i guess everyone has decided to go ??
Ofc everyone is not free like you , we got work to do !!
